---
title: "Publications"
description: "Peer-reviewed papers, preprints, and conference presentations."
page-layout: article
---

::: {.eyebrow}
§ 01 · Peer-reviewed
:::

## Journal

```{=html}
<div class="csl-entry">
  Guan Y, Wang X, Li H, <strong>Zhang Z</strong>, Chen X, Siddiqui O, Nehring S, Huang X.
  Detecting asymmetric patterns and localizing cancers on mammograms.
  <em>Patterns</em> 1, no. 7 (2020).
  <a href="https://www.cell.com/patterns/fulltext/S2666-3899(20)30140-9" class="external">DOI</a>
</div>
```

::: {.eyebrow style="margin-top: 3rem;"}
§ 02 · Preprint
:::

## bioRxiv

```{=html}
<div class="csl-entry">
  Innocenti C, <strong>Zhang Z</strong>, Selvaraj B, Gaffney I, Frangos M, Cohen-Setton J, et al.
  An unsupervised graph embeddings approach to multiplex immunofluorescence image exploration.
  <em>bioRxiv</em> 2021.06.09.447654 (2021).
  <a href="https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2021.06.09.447654v1" class="external">Preprint</a>
</div>
```

::: {.eyebrow style="margin-top: 3rem;"}
§ 03 · Conference presentations
:::

## AACR Annual Meeting

```{=html}
<div class="csl-entry">
  Hughes G, Patwari M, Wei Y, Parker M, Parkin J, <strong>Zhang Z</strong>, Filippov A.
  Automatic contrast phase classification of polyphasic CT scans.
  Poster, <em>AACR Annual Meeting 2026</em>.
  Abstract: <em>Cancer Research</em> 86, Suppl. 7, 2777.
  <a href="https://aacrjournals.org/cancerres/article/86/7_Supplement/2777" class="external">Abstract</a>
</div>

<div class="csl-entry">
  Patwari M, Wei Y, Xu M, <strong>Zhang Z</strong>, Sidiropoulos K, Selvaraj B, Hughes G, et al.
  Fast, interactive, AI-assisted 3D lung tumour segmentation.
  Poster, <em>AACR Annual Meeting 2024</em>.
  Abstract: <em>Cancer Research</em> 84, Suppl. 6, 887.
  <a href="https://aacrjournals.org/cancerres/article/84/6_Supplement/887/741446" class="external">Abstract</a>
</div>

<div class="csl-entry">
  Wei Y, Selvaraj B, Patwari M, Li Q, Xu M, Sidiropoulos K, <strong>Zhang Z</strong>, et al.
  Improving non-small cell lung cancer segmentation on a challenging dataset.
  Poster, <em>AACR Annual Meeting 2023</em>.
  Abstract: <em>Cancer Research</em> 83, Suppl. 7, 5427.
  <a href="https://aacrjournals.org/cancerres/article/83/7_Supplement/5427/719631" class="external">Abstract</a>
</div>

<div class="csl-entry">
  Fedden L, <strong>Zhang Z</strong>, Baykaner K, Li Q, Bordeaux L.
  DIME-CT: Self-supervised learning for medical image analysis using patch-based embeddings.
  Poster, <em>AACR Annual Meeting 2022</em>.
  Abstract: <em>Cancer Research</em> 82, Suppl. 12, 1937.
  <a href="https://aacrjournals.org/cancerres/article/82/12_Supplement/1937/703544" class="external">Abstract</a>
</div>
```

## Society for Immunotherapy of Cancer (SITC)

```{=html}
<div class="csl-entry">
  Innocenti C, <strong>Zhang Z</strong>, et al.
  Multiplex immunofluorescence image exploration via unsupervised graph embeddings.
  Poster, <em>SITC 2021</em>.
  <a href="https://jitc.bmj.com/content/9/Suppl_2/A860" class="external">Abstract</a>
</div>
```

## AACR Tumor Immunology and Immunotherapy

```{=html}
<div class="csl-entry">
  <strong>Zhang Z</strong>, et al.
  Graph-based analysis of multiplex immunofluorescence imaging.
  <em>Clinical Cancer Research</em> 27, no. 5 Supplement (2021): PR-05.
  <a href="https://aacrjournals.org/clincancerres/article/27/5_Supplement/PR-05/32768" class="external">Abstract</a>
</div>
```
